training_status: Strength training 3-4 times per week, no cardio

side_effects.description: Lost significant muscle mass despite strength training

protocol_notes: OP claims only retatrutide was used. Diet consisted of sweet potato, 93% lean ground beef, chicken breast, eggs, and avocado — high protein, very low carb and fat. Starting weight 286 lbs, ending weight 198 lbs over 6 months. OP previously weighed ~220 lbs shredded. Community commenters widely suspected additional compounds (testosterone, HGH, tesamorelin, BPC-157 stack) were used but OP denied this.
